{{Quote|I guarantee that this Droid is in good working order and of worth as I represent it.|Aguilae|<ref name="GG7" />}}
'''Aguilae''', born '''Khea Nkul''', was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Jawa/Legends|Jawa]] who was the manager of the [[Jawa Traders]], a [[Droid/Legends|droid]] store in [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]]. The [[Squib/Legends|Squib]] [[Macemillian-winduarté]] was indebted to her.

==Biography==
A [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Jawa/Legends|Jawa]] who was born as Khea Nkul of the [[Weekkata]] tribe<ref name="Spare Parts" /> became known in [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Basic]] as Aguilae. She held the title of manager of the [[Jawa Traders]], a [[Droid/Legends|droid]] store in [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]] which was clearly favored by [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]] and [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]]. At some point, [[Squib/Legends|Squib]] [[Macemillian-winduarté]] got indebted with Aguilae. Noticing that she could not manage the store by herself, Aguilae agreed to forget Macemillian-winduarté's debt if he accepted a job with her.<ref name="GG7" />

Macemillian-winduarté bought accounting [[Droid/Legends|droid]] [[CZ-3/Legends|CZ-3]], which was being searched by both criminal businessman [[Opun Mcgrrrr|Opun "Black Hole" Mcgrrrr]] and [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]]. Aguilae quickly sold the droid to [[Het Nkik/Legends|Het Nkik's]] tribe, before Mcgrrr could find it on her store.

However, Aguilae and Macemillian-winduarté then tried to buy it again, and looked for the [[Sandcrawler/Legends|sandcrawler]] of the customers. When they reached the sandcrawler, CZ-3 was no longer there. However, that sandcrawler suddenly was under attack of [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]]. Aguilae and Macemillian-winduarté barely escaped with their lives.

Later, Aguilae found CZ-3, but the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Zutton/Legends|Zutton]] had destroyed it prior to discovery. Aguilae took the droid's motivator and some other parts.
